error_signature: Container not updated to the latest version
title: Docker container not updating to the latest n8n version
symptom: After pulling the latest n8n image, the running container still shows the old version. No error messages are displayed during the update process.
applies_when: Attempting to update to the latest version
not_this_if: Container is already running the latest version
Using a specific version tag instead of latest
root_cause: When using the 'latest' tag, Docker may not recreate the container if it believes the existing one is up-to-date. This can lead to the old version still being in use despite pulling a new image.
fix_steps: Run 'docker compose down' to stop and remove the current containers.
Run 'docker compose up --force-recreate n8n' to recreate the container with the latest image.
agent_instruction: Use the command 'docker compose up --force-recreate n8n' to ensure the container is updated.
safety_notes: Ensure you have backups of your workflows and credentials before making changes.
